title: rubus guttans
intro: Rubus guttatus, also known as the spotted raspberry or Japanese bramble, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family native to East Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus guttatus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Rubus guttatus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
